title: Format System
description: A pluggable Angular formatting framework: registry-based formatters, built-in number and string formatters, reactive format pipe, structural directive, fluent API, and extension points for date-time, file size, and custom formatters.
imports: import { AXFormatService, AXFormatModule, AXFormatPipe, AXFormatterDirective, AXFormatter, AXFormatterRegistryService, AXNumberFormatter, AXStringFormatter } from '@acorex/core/format';

hints.title: Always use async with the pipe
hints.content: AXFormatPipe returns Observable<string>. In templates always chain | async: {{ value | format: 'number' | async }}.

hints.title: Register formatters via module
hints.content: Built-in number and string formatters are registered by AXFormatModule.forRoot() or forChild(). Import companion modules such as AXDateTimeModule or AXFileModule to add date, timeleft, filesize, etc.

hints.title: Reactive re-formatting
hints.content: The format pipe automatically re-evaluates when AXSystemEvents fire (language, locale, calendar changes). Formatters with updateInterval (e.g. timeleft) refresh periodically — no manual subscription needed in templates.

hints.title: Deprecated axDate pipe
hints.content: Do not use the legacy axDate pipe from @acorex/core/date-time. Prefer {{ date | format: 'date' | async }} or format: 'datetime' instead.

types.title: AXFormatter (abstract)
types.description: Base class every formatter must extend.

props.name: name
props.description: Unique formatter key used in pipe and service calls (e.g. 'number', 'date').

props.name: updateInterval?
props.description: When set (ms), AXFormatPipe re-formats at this interval. Used by timeleft.

methods.content:
/**
 * Transforms a value into a display string.
 */
abstract format(value: unknown, options?: AXFormatOptions | string): string

types.title: AXFormatOptionsMap
types.description: Type map for formatter-specific options. Extended via TypeScript module augmentation in companion packages.

props.name: number
props.description: Options for the built-in number formatter.

props.name: string
props.description: Options for the built-in string formatter.

props.name: thousandSeparator?
props.description: Character between thousands groups. Defaults from locale via Intl.

props.name: decimalSeparator?
props.description: Character before fractional part. Defaults from locale.

props.name: zeroPadLength?
props.description: Minimum integer width, left-padded with zeros.

props.name: locale?
props.description: BCP 47 locale for separator detection (default: navigator.language).

types.title: AXFormatterRegistryService
types.description: Root registry that holds all formatter plugin instances.

methods.content:
/**
 * Instantiates and registers formatter classes.
 * Duplicate names are ignored.
 */
register(...plugins: (new () => AXFormatter)[]): void

/**
 * Resolves a formatter by name.
 * @throws Error when not found.
 */
get(name: string): AXFormatter

types.title: AXFormatService
types.description: Root service for imperative formatting and manual refresh triggers.

props.name: onRender
props.description: Emits when render() is called — useful for custom refresh logic.

methods.content:
/**
 * Formats a value with the named formatter.
 */
format(value: unknown, formatter: string, options?: unknown): string

/**
 * Starts a type-safe fluent chain.
 * Example: formatService.format(1000).to('number', { locale: 'fa-IR' })
 */
format(value: unknown): AXFormatFluent

/**
 * Notifies listeners that formatted output should refresh.
 */
render(): void

types.title: AXFormatPipe
types.description: Pure pipe that returns Observable<string> and re-formats on system events or updateInterval.

methods.content:
/**
 * @param value - Raw value to format.
 * @param name - Formatter key.
 * @param options - Formatter options object or shorthand string.
 * @returns Observable<string> — use with async pipe.
 */
transform(value: unknown, name: string, options?: AXFormatOptions | string): Observable<string>

types.title: AXFormatterDirective
types.description: Structural directive that exposes a format() helper in the template context.

types.title: AXFormatModule
types.description: Registers built-in formatters and exports AXFormatPipe and AXFormatterDirective.

methods.content:
/**
 * Root configuration. Registers number + string formatters
 * plus any custom formatters passed in configs.formatters.
 */
static forRoot(configs?: { formatters?: (new () => AXFormatter)[] }): ModuleWithProviders<AXFormatModule>

/**
 * Feature-level registration of additional formatters.
 */
static forChild(configs?: { formatters?: (new () => AXFormatter)[] }): ModuleWithProviders<AXFormatModule>

sections.title: Overview
sections.description: How the format system fits together.

content.data:
The @acorex/core/format package is the foundation for all display formatting in AcoreX.

• AXFormatModule registers formatters into AXFormatterRegistryService.
• AXFormatService formats values imperatively in TypeScript.
• AXFormatPipe formats reactively in templates and listens to AXEventService system events.
• Companion packages extend the system:
  – @acorex/core/date-time → date, time, datetime, timeleft, time-duration
  – @acorex/core/file → filesize

Built-in formatters: number, string.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Register the built-in formatters once, then format values in templates or TypeScript.

sections.title: AXFormatService — Direct Formatting
sections.description: Format values in component logic without the pipe.

sections.title: Number Formatter
sections.description: Built-in number formatting with locale-aware separators.

data.content: {{ amount | format: 'number': { locale: 'fa-IR', decimalPlaces: 0 } | async }}

{{ 12345 | format: 'number': { locale: 'en-US' } | async }}

{{ orderDate | format: 'date': 'short' | async }}

{{ orderDate | format: 'date': { format: 'yyyy/MM/dd', calendar: 'solar-hijri' } | async }}

{{ meetingTime | format: 'time': { format: 'HH:mm' } | async }}

{{ message.timestamp | format: 'timeleft' | async }} {{ file.size | format: 'filesize' | async }}

sections.title: Formatter Directive
sections.description: Expose format() inside a template block.

sections.title: Creating a Custom Formatter
sections.description: Extend AXFormatter and register via forChild.

content.data:
Some formatters define updateInterval (in milliseconds). When set, AXFormatPipe merges a shared RxJS interval with system event triggers so the displayed value updates automatically.

The timeleft formatter (from @acorex/core/date-time) sets updateInterval = 1000 and displays relative strings like '5 minutes ago'. No manual setInterval or signal refresh is needed in your component — just bind the pipe with async.

To build a live clock formatter:

1. Set updateInterval on your AXFormatter subclass.
2. Implement format() to return the current formatted value.
3. Register via AXFormatModule.forChild().

AXFormatPipe subscribes to AXEventService.onEvent and re-formats when any AXSystemEvents value is emitted:

• AXLanguageChanged / AXLanguageLoaded — translation language changed
• AXLocaleChanged / AXLocaleLoaded — locale profile changed
• AXCalendarChanged — active calendar system changed

This means date, number, and timeleft outputs in templates stay in sync with global settings without extra component logic. When you change formatting outside templates, call AXFormatService.render() or rely on the pipe's built-in triggers.

Built-in (@acorex/core/format):
• number — locale-aware numeric formatting
• string — interpolation and key lookup

From @acorex/core/date-time (import AXDateTimeModule):
• date — date-only formatting with calendar/locale support
• time — time-only formatting
• datetime — combined date + time
• timeleft — relative time ('5 minutes ago'), auto-refreshes every 1s
• time-duration — duration display (e.g. audio player timestamps)

From @acorex/core/file (import AXFileModule):
• filesize — bytes to '1.46 MB'

Register custom formatters with any unique name via forRoot/forChild.
